changelogFindings.change: Top-level Notes endpoints added: POST /notes/, POST /notes/search, DELETE /notes/{id}, GET /notes/{id}, PUT /notes/{id}, PATCH /notes/{id}/attachments, PUT /notes/{id}/relations, POST /notes/{id}/restore
New user scope enum values added for audit logs, location management, and payments settings
Email Campaign V2 APIs introduced; future email campaign improvements focus on V2 endpoints
